# dt_update_row_composite_reject

This operation fixture pair was generated by `BPXGenerateFixtures` commandlet.

- command: `datatable update-row`
- expect: `unsupported`
- notes: UE5.6 composite tables rebuild rows from parents; bpx rejects writes to composite tables.
